question: According to the chart data, during which period did the river water level drop by the larger amount from the first year to the last year of the period?

options.C: It cannot be determined from the chart
options.D: Both periods show about the same drop

explanation: The chart uses a non-linear (inappropriate) y-axis scaling function, so equal vertical distances do not correspond to equal changes in the underlying values. That can make one period look like it changed more even when the data show otherwise. 1991-1993: 260 cm → 246 cm (-14 cm); 1995-1997: 43 cm → 30 cm (-13 cm).
